```json
        "originalContents": "\n\tmarkdown: {\n\t\tremarkPlugins: [\n\t\t\tremarkMath,\n\t\t\tremarkReadingTime,\n\t\t\tremarkExcerpt,\n\t\t\tremarkGithubAdmonitionsToDirectives,\n\t\t\tremarkDirective,\n\t\t\tremarkSectionize,\n\t\t\tparseDirectiveNode,\n\t\t],\n\t\trehypePlugins: [\n\t\t\trehypeKatex,\n\t\t\trehypeSlug,\n\t\t\t[\n\t\t\t\trehypeComponents,\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tcomponents: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tgithub: GithubCardComponent,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnote: (x, y) =\u003e AdmonitionComponent(x, y, \"note\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttip: (x, y) =\u003e AdmonitionComponent(x, y, \"tip\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\timportant: (x, y) =\u003e AdmonitionComponent(x, y, \"important\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcaution: (x, y) =\u003e AdmonitionComponent(x, y, \"caution\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\twarning: (x, y) =\u003e AdmonitionComponent(x, y, \"warning\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t],\n\t\t\t[\n\t\t\t\trehypeAutolinkHeadings,\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tbehavior: \"append\",\n\t\t\t\t\tproperties: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tclassName: [\"anchor\"],\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tcontent: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: \"element\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttagName: \"span\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tproperties: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tclassName: [\"anchor-icon\"],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"data-pagefind-ignore\": true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tchildren: [\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: \"text\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tvalue: \"#\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t],\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t],\n\t\t],\n\t},\n\tvite: {\n\t\tbuild: {\n\t\t\trollupOptions: {\n\t\t\t\tonwarn(warning, warn) {\n\t\t\t\t\t// temporarily suppress this warning\n\t\t\t\t\tif (\n\t\t\t\t\t\twarning.message.includes(\"is dynamically imported by\") \u0026\u0026\n\t\t\t\t\t\twarning.message.includes(\"but also statically imported by\")\n\t\t\t\t\t) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\twarn(warning);\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t},\n});",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n# Portfolio\n\n## デプロイ方法\n\n- [アウトプット用リポジトリ](https://github.com/tutttuwi/output) に定義したワークフローでこのリポジトリを管理しています。\n\n## デプロイフロー\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\ngraph TB\n    A[tutttuwi/output\u003cbr/\u003eリポジトリ] --\u003e|mainブランチにpush| B[GitHub Actions\u003cbr/\u003eワークフロー実行]\n    B --\u003e C[ビルド実行]\n    C --\u003e D[dist ディレクトリ生成]\n    C --\u003e E[dist_githubpages ディレクトリ生成]\n    C --\u003e F[src/content/spec/about.md 読み込み]\n    \n    D --\u003e G[tutttuwi/tutttuwi.github.io\u003cbr/\u003eリポジトリ masterブランチ]\n    E --\u003e G\n    G --\u003e H[https://tutttuwi.github.io\u003cbr/\u003eサイト公開]\n    \n    F --\u003e I[tutttuwi/tutttuwi\u003cbr/\u003eリポジトリ mainブランチ]\n    I --\u003e J[README.md として反映\u003cbr/\u003eGitHubプロフィール表示]\n    \n    style A fill:#e1f5ff\n    style G fill:#fff4e1\n    style I fill:#ffe1f5\n    style H fill:#e1ffe1\n    style J fill:#e1ffe1\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## リポジトリ間の関係\n\n- **tutttuwi/output**: ソースコードリポジトリ（このリポジトリ）\n  - 更新内容をmainブランチにpushすると自動デプロイが開始されます\n  \n- **tutttuwi/tutttuwi.github.io**: GitHub Pages公開用リポジトリ\n  - &#96;dist&#96;と&#96;dist_githubpages&#96;の内容が自動的にデプロイされます\n  - &#96;https://tutttuwi.github.io&#96;でサイトが公開されます\n  \n- **tutttuwi/tutttuwi**: GitHubプロフィール表示用リポジトリ\n  - &#96;src/content/spec/about.md&#96;の内容が&#96;README.md&#96;として自動更新されます\n  - GitHubプロフィールページに表示されます\n",
        "detailedLines": [

            "text": "# Portfolio"

          {
            "lineNumber": 3

            "lineNumber": 4,

          },

            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    B --\u003e C[ビルド実行]"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    D --\u003e G[tutttuwi/tutttuwi.github.io\u003cbr/\u003eリポジトリ masterブランチ]"

          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    E --\u003e G"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "## リポジトリ間の関係"

            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "- **tutttuwi/output**: ソースコードリポジトリ（このリポジトリ）"

        "originalContents": "\n# Portfolio\n\n## デプロイ方法\n\n- [アウトプット用リポジトリ](https://github.com/tutttuwi/output) に定義したワークフローでこのリポジトリを管理しています。\n\n## デプロイフロー\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\ngraph TB\n    A[tutttuwi/output\u003cbr/\u003eリポジトリ] --\u003e|mainブランチにpush| B[GitHub Actions\u003cbr/\u003eワークフロー実行]\n    B --\u003e C[ビルド実行]\n    C --\u003e D[dist ディレクトリ生成]\n    C --\u003e E[dist_githubpages ディレクトリ生成]\n    C --\u003e F[src/content/spec/about.md 読み込み]\n    \n    D --\u003e G[tutttuwi/tutttuwi.github.io\u003cbr/\u003eリポジトリ masterブランチ]\n    E --\u003e G\n    G --\u003e H[https://tutttuwi.github.io\u003cbr/\u003eサイト公開]\n    \n    F --\u003e I[tutttuwi/tutttuwi\u003cbr/\u003eリポジトリ mainブランチ]\n    I --\u003e J[README.md として反映\u003cbr/\u003eGitHubプロフィール表示]\n    \n    style A fill:#e1f5ff\n    style G fill:#fff4e1\n    style I fill:#ffe1f5\n    style H fill:#e1ffe1\n    style J fill:#e1ffe1\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## リポジトリ間の関係\n\n- **tutttuwi/output**: ソースコードリポジトリ（このリポジトリ）\n  - 更新内容をmainブランチにpushすると自動デプロイが開始されます\n  \n- **tutttuwi/tutttuwi.github.io**: GitHub Pages公開用リポジトリ\n  - &#96;dist&#96;と&#96;dist_githubpages&#96;の内容が自動的にデプロイされます\n  - &#96;https://tutttuwi.github.io&#96;でサイトが公開されます\n  \n- **tutttuwi/tutttuwi**: GitHubプロフィール表示用リポジトリ\n  - &#96;src/content/spec/about.md&#96;の内容が&#96;README.md&#96;として自動更新されます\n  - GitHubプロフィールページに表示されます\n",

        "contents": "---\nimport \"@fontsource-variable/jetbrains-mono\";\nimport \"@fontsource-variable/jetbrains-mono/wght-italic.css\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tclass: string;\n}\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\n---\n\u003cdiv data-pagefind-body class={&#96;prose dark:prose-invert prose-base !max-w-none custom-md ${className}&#96;}\u003e\n    \u003c!--\u003cdiv class=\"prose dark:prose-invert max-w-none custom-md\"\u003e--\u003e\n    \u003c!--\u003cdiv class=\"max-w-none custom-md\"\u003e--\u003e\n    \u003cslot/\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003cscript\u003e\ndocument.addEventListener(\"click\", function (e: MouseEvent) {\n    const target = e.target as Element | null;\n    if (target \u0026\u0026 target.classList.contains(\"copy-btn\")) {\n        const preEle = target.closest(\"pre\");\n        const codeEle = preEle?.querySelector(\"code\");\n        const code = Array.from(codeEle?.querySelectorAll(\".code:not(summary *)\") ?? [])\n            .map(el =\u003e el.textContent)\n            .map(t =\u003e t === \"\\n\" ? \"\" : t)\n            .join(\"\\n\");\n        navigator.clipboard.writeText(code);\n\n        const timeoutId = target.getAttribute(\"data-timeout-id\");\n        if (timeoutId) {\n            clearTimeout(parseInt(timeoutId));\n        }\n\n        target.classList.add(\"success\");\n\n        // 设置新的timeout并保存ID到按钮的自定义属性中\n        const newTimeoutId = setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n            target.classList.remove(\"success\");\n        }, 1000);\n\n        target.setAttribute(\"data-timeout-id\", newTimeoutId.toString());\n    }\n});\n\u003c/script\u003e\n",

        "contents": "\u003ch1\u003e\u003cspan style=\"float:left; margin-right:5px;\"\u003eHi, I'm Tomoaki Tsutsui\u003c/span\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://media.giphy.com/media/hvRJCLFzcasrR4ia7z/giphy.gif\" width=\"28\"\u003e\u003c/h1\u003e\n\n\u003cp align=\"center\"\u003e\n  \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/DenverCoder1/readme-typing-svg\"\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://readme-typing-svg.herokuapp.com?lines=Software+Developer;Flutter Engineer;MobileApp%20|%20DDD%20|%20OOP%20;Always%20learning%20new%20things\u0026center=true\u0026width=500\u0026height=50\"\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n\u003cdiv\u003e\n    \u003cimg src=\"https://komarev.com/ghpvc/?username=tutttuwi\"/\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c!--\n**tutttuwi/tutttuwi** is a ✨ _special_ ✨ repository because its &#96;README.md&#96; (this file) appears on your GitHub profile.\n\nHere are some ideas to get you started:\n\n- 🔭 I’m currently working on ...\n- 🌱 I’m currently learning ...\n- 👯 I’m looking to collaborate on ...\n- 🤔 I’m looking for help with ...\n- 💬 Ask me about ...\n- 📫 How to reach me: ...\n- 😄 Pronouns: ...\n- ⚡ Fun fact: ...\n--\u003e\n\n\u003c!--\n[icon]\n- use: \u003chttps://thuongtruong109.github.io/icoziv/\u003e\n- find here: \u003chttps://thuongtruong109.github.io/icoziv/\u003e\n--\u003e\n\n### 🛠 \u0026nbsp;Tech Stack\n\n#### Frontend\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=flutter-dark,html,css,javascript,typescript,vuejs,bootstrap,angularjs,nextjs\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### Backend\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=java,spring,nodejs,python\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### ☁️ Cloud \u0026 Database\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=amazonewebservices-dark,azure-dark,googlecloud,postgresql,kubernetes,mongodb,sqlserver1-dark\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### Tools \u0026 Environments\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=git,gitlab,linux,visualstudiocode-dark,windows-dark,eclipse-dark\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### Misc\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=adobeillustrator,adobephotoshop,apachemaven-dark,chai-dark,gulp,mocha-dark\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n### 💳 Github Profile Summary Card\n\n",

(this file) appears on your GitHub profile.\n\nHere are some ideas to get you started:\n\n- 🔭 I’m currently working on ...\n- 🌱 I’m currently learning ...\n- 👯 I’m looking to collaborate on ...\n- 🤔 I’m looking for help with ...\n- 💬 Ask me about ...\n- 📫 How to reach me: ...\n- 😄 Pronouns: ...\n- ⚡ Fun fact: ...\n--\u003e\n\n\u003c!--\n[icon]\n- use: \u003chttps://thuongtruong109.github.io/icoziv/\u003e\n- find here: \u003chttps://thuongtruong109.github.io/icoziv/\u003e\n--\u003e\n\n### 🛠 \u0026nbsp;Tech Stack\n\n#### Frontend\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=flutter-dark,html,css,javascript,typescript,vuejs,bootstrap,angularjs,nextjs\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### Backend\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=java,spring,nodejs,python\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### ☁️ Cloud \u0026 Database\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=amazonewebservices-dark,azure-dark,googlecloud,postgresql,kubernetes,mongodb,sqlserver1-dark\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### Tools \u0026 Environments\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=git,gitlab,linux,visualstudiocode-dark,windows-dark,eclipse-dark\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### Misc\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=adobeillustrator,adobephotoshop,apachemaven-dark,chai-dark,gulp,mocha-dark\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n### 💳 Github Profile Summary Card\n\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/// \u003creference types=\"mdast\" /\u003e\nimport { h } from \"hastscript\";\n\n/**\n * Creates a GitHub Card component.\n *\n * @param {Object} properties - The properties of the component.\n * @param {string} properties.repo - The GitHub repository in the format \"owner/repo\".\n * @param {import('mdast').RootContent[]} children - The children elements of the component.\n * @returns {import('mdast').Parent} The created GitHub Card component.\n */\nexport function GithubCardComponent(properties, children) {\n\tif (Array.isArray(children) \u0026\u0026 children.length !== 0)\n\t\treturn h(\"div\", { class: \"hidden\" }, [\n\t\t\t'Invalid directive. (\"github\" directive must be leaf type \"::github{repo=\"owner/repo\"}\")',\n\t\t]);\n\n\tif (!properties.repo || !properties.repo.includes(\"/\"))\n\t\treturn h(\n\t\t\t\"div\",\n\t\t\t{ class: \"hidden\" },\n\t\t\t'Invalid repository.     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "---\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/400.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/500.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/700.css\";\n\nimport ConfigCarrier from \"@components/ConfigCarrier.astro\";\nimport { profileConfig, siteConfig } from \"@/config\";\nimport {\n\tAUTO_MODE,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_HOME,\n\tDARK_MODE,\n\tDEFAULT_THEME,\n\tLIGHT_MODE,\n\tPAGE_WIDTH,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport { defaultFavicons } from \"../constants/icon\";\nimport type { Favicon } from \"../types/config\";\nimport { pathsEqual, url } from \"../utils/url-utils\";\nimport \"katex/dist/katex.css\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n}\n\nlet { title, banner, description, lang, setOGTypeArticle } = Astro.props;\n\n// apply a class to the body element to decide the height of the banner, only used for initial page load\n// Swup can update the body for each page visit, but it's after the page transition, causing a delay for banner height change\n// so use Swup hooks instead to change the height immediately when a link is clicked\nconst isHomePage = pathsEqual(Astro.url.pathname, url(\"/\"));\n\n// defines global css variables\n// why doing this in Layout instead of GlobalStyles: https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/6728#issuecomment-1502203757\nconst configHue = siteConfig.themeColor.hue;\nif (!banner || typeof banner !== \"string\" || banner.trim() === \"\") {\n\tbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n}\n\n// TODO don't use post cover as banner for now\nbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n\nconst enableBanner = siteConfig.banner.enable;\n\nlet pageTitle: string;\nif (title) {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${title} - ${siteConfig.title}&#96;;\n} else {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${siteConfig.title} - ${siteConfig.subtitle}&#96;;\n}\n\nconst favicons: Favicon[] =\n\tsiteConfig.favicon.length \u003e 0 ? siteConfig.favicon : defaultFavicons;\n\n// const siteLang = siteConfig.lang.replace('_', '-')\nif (!lang) {\n\tlang = &#96;${siteConfig.lang}&#96;;\n}\nconst siteLang = lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\");\n\n",

            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "const siteLang = lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\");"

          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "const bannerOffsetByPosition = {"
          },

            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\ttop: &#96;${BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND}vh&#96;,"

        ],
        "originalContents": "---\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/400.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/500.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/700.css\";\n\nimport ConfigCarrier from \"@components/ConfigCarrier.astro\";\nimport { profileConfig, siteConfig } from \"@/config\";\nimport {\n\tAUTO_MODE,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_HOME,\n\tDARK_MODE,\n\tDEFAULT_THEME,\n\tLIGHT_MODE,\n\tPAGE_WIDTH,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport { defaultFavicons } from \"../constants/icon\";\nimport type { Favicon } from \"../types/config\";\nimport { pathsEqual, url } from \"../utils/url-utils\";\nimport \"katex/dist/katex.css\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n}\n\nlet { title, banner, description, lang, setOGTypeArticle } = Astro.props;\n\n// apply a class to the body element to decide the height of the banner, only used for initial page load\n// Swup can update the body for each page visit, but it's after the page transition, causing a delay for banner height change\n// so use Swup hooks instead to change the height immediately when a link is clicked\nconst isHomePage = pathsEqual(Astro.url.pathname, url(\"/\"));\n\n// defines global css variables\n// why doing this in Layout instead of GlobalStyles: https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/6728#issuecomment-1502203757\nconst configHue = siteConfig.themeColor.hue;\nif (!banner || typeof banner !== \"string\" || banner.trim() === \"\") {\n\tbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n}\n\n// TODO don't use post cover as banner for now\nbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n\nconst enableBanner = siteConfig.banner.enable;\n\nlet pageTitle: string;\nif (title) {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${title} - ${siteConfig.title}&#96;;\n} else {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${siteConfig.title} - ${siteConfig.subtitle}&#96;;\n}\n\nconst favicons: Favicon[] =\n\tsiteConfig.favicon.length \u003e 0 ? siteConfig.favicon : defaultFavicons;\n\n// const siteLang = siteConfig.lang.replace('_', '-')\nif (!lang) {\n\tlang = &#96;${siteConfig.lang}&#96;;\n}\nconst siteLang = lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\");\n\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 67

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# GitHub Pages への自動デプロイ手順\n\nこのドキュメントでは、プロジェクトを更新した際に &#96;https://tutttuwi.github.io/&#96; に自動デプロイするための手順を説明します。\n\n**注意**: このプロジェクトは &#96;tutttuwi/output&#96; リポジトリにありますが、デプロイ先は &#96;tutttuwi/tutttuwi.github.io&#96; リポジトリです。\n\n## 前提条件\n\n- GitHub アカウントを持っていること\n- リポジトリ &#96;https://github.com/tutttuwi/tutttuwi.github.io&#96; への書き込み権限があること\n- ローカルに Git がインストールされていること\n\n## 手順\n\n### 1. Astro 設定ファイルの更新\n\n&#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; の &#96;site&#96; 設定を GitHub Pages の URL に変更します。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\nexport default defineConfig({\n  site: \"https://tutttuwi.github.io\",\n  base: \"/\",\n  // ... その他の設定\n});\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 2. Personal Access Token (PAT) の作成\n\n別のリポジトリ（&#96;tutttuwi/tutttuwi.github.io&#96;）にデプロイするため、Personal Access Token を作成する必要があります。\n\n1. GitHub にログインし、**Settings** → **Developer settings** → **Personal access tokens** → **Tokens (classic)** に移動\n2. **Generate new token** → **Generate new token (classic)** をクリック\n3. 以下の設定を行います：\n   - **Note**: &#96;Deploy to tutttuwi.github.io&#96; など、分かりやすい名前を入力\n   - **Expiration**: 有効期限を設定（推奨: 90日または無期限）\n   - **Select scopes**: 以下の権限にチェックを入れる\n     - &#96;repo&#96; (Full control of private repositories)\n4. **Generate token** をクリック\n5. **生成されたトークンをコピー**（後で表示されないため、必ずコピーしてください）\n\n### 3. GitHub シークレットの設定\n\n1. &#96;tutttuwi/output&#96; リポジトリの **Settings** → **Secrets and variables** → **Actions** に移動\n2. **New repository secret** をクリック\n",

        "originalContents": "# GitHub Pages への自動デプロイ手順\n\nこのドキュメントでは、プロジェクトを更新した際に &#96;https://tutttuwi.github.io/&#96; に自動デプロイするための手順を説明します。\n\n**注意**: このプロジェクトは &#96;tutttuwi/output&#96; リポジトリにありますが、デプロイ先は &#96;tutttuwi/tutttuwi.github.io&#96; リポジトリです。\n\n## 前提条件\n\n- GitHub アカウントを持っていること\n- リポジトリ &#96;https://github.com/tutttuwi/tutttuwi.github.io&#96; への書き込み権限があること\n- ローカルに Git がインストールされていること\n\n## 手順\n\n### 1.         "contents": "import type {\n\tExpressiveCodeConfig,\n\tLicenseConfig,\n\tNavBarConfig,\n\tProfileConfig,\n\tSiteConfig,\n} from \"./types/config\";\nimport { LinkPreset } from \"./types/config\";\n\nexport const siteConfig: SiteConfig = {\n\ttitle: \"Home\",\n\tsubtitle: \"Portfolio\",\n\tlang: \"en\", // Language code, e.g. 'en', 'zh_CN', 'ja', etc.\n\tthemeColor: {\n\t\thue: 250, // Default hue for the theme color, from 0 to 360. e.g. red: 0, teal: 200, cyan: 250, pink: 345\n\t\tfixed: false, // Hide the theme color picker for visitors\n\t},\n\tbanner: {\n\t\tenable: true,\n\t\tsrc: \"assets/images/banner.png\", // Relative to the /src directory. Relative to the /public directory if it starts with '/'\n\t\tposition: \"center\", // Equivalent to object-position, only supports 'top', 'center', 'bottom'.     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# 🍥Fuwari\n\n基于 [Astro](https://astro.build) 开发的静态博客模板。\n\n[**🖥️在线预览（Vercel）**](https://fuwari.vercel.app)\n\n![Preview Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saicaca/resource/main/fuwari/home.png)\n\n## ✨ 功能特性\n\n- [x] 基于 Astro 和 Tailwind CSS 开发\n- [x] 流畅的动画和页面过渡\n- [x] 亮色 / 暗色模式\n- [x] 自定义主题色和横幅图片\n- [x] 响应式设计\n- [ ] 评论\n- [x] 搜索\n- [x] 文内目录\n\n## 👀 要求\n\n- Node.js \u003c= 22\n- pnpm \u003c= 9\n\n## 🚀 使用方法 1\n\n使用 [create-fuwari](https://github.com/L4Ph/create-fuwari) 在本地初始化项目。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sh\n# npm\nnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# yarn\nyarn create fuwari\n\n# pnpm\npnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# bun\nbun create fuwari@latest\n\n# deno\ndeno run -A npm:create-fuwari@latest\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n1. 通过配置文件 &#96;src/config.ts&#96; 自定义博客\n2. 执行 &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96; 创建新文章，并在 &#96;src/content/posts/&#96; 目录中编辑\n3. 参考[官方指南](https://docs.astro.build/zh-cn/guides/deploy/)将博客部署至 Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages 等；部署前需编辑 &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; 中的站点设置。\n\n## 🚀 使用方法 2\n\n1. 使用此模板[生成新仓库](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari/generate)或 Fork 此仓库\n2. 进行本地开发，Clone 新的仓库，执行 &#96;pnpm install&#96; 和 &#96;pnpm add sharp&#96; 以安装依赖  \n   - 若未安装 [pnpm](https://pnpm.io)，执行 &#96;npm install -g pnpm&#96;\n3. 通过配置文件 &#96;src/config.ts&#96; 自定义博客\n4. 执行 &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96; 创建新文章，并在 &#96;src/content/posts/&#96; 目录中编辑\n5. 参考[官方指南](https://docs.astro.build/zh-cn/guides/deploy/)将博客部署至 Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages 等；部署前需编辑 &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; 中的站点设置。\n\n## ⚙️ 文章 Frontmatter\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\n---\ntitle: My First Blog Post\npublished: 2023-09-09\ndescription: This is the first post of my new Astro blog.\nimage: ./cover.jpg\ntags: [Foo, Bar]\ncategory: Front-end\n",

        "originalContents": "# 🍥Fuwari\n\n基于 [Astro](https://astro.build) 开发的静态博客模板。\n\n[**🖥️在线预览（Vercel）**](https://fuwari.vercel.app)\n\n![Preview Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saicaca/resource/main/fuwari/home.png)\n\n## ✨ 功能特性\n\n- [x] 基于 Astro 和 Tailwind CSS 开发\n- [x] 流畅的动画和页面过渡\n- [x] 亮色 / 暗色模式\n- [x] 自定义主题色和横幅图片\n- [x] 响应式设计\n- [ ] 评论\n- [x] 搜索\n- [x] 文内目录\n\n## 👀 要求\n\n- Node.js \u003c= 22\n- pnpm \u003c= 9\n\n## 🚀 使用方法 1\n\n使用 [create-fuwari](https://github.com/L4Ph/create-fuwari) 在本地初始化项目。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sh\n# npm\nnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# yarn\nyarn create fuwari\n\n# pnpm\npnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# bun\nbun create fuwari@latest\n\n# deno\ndeno run -A npm:create-fuwari@latest\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n1. 通过配置文件 &#96;src/config.ts&#96; 自定义博客\n2. 执行 &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96; 创建新文章，并在 &#96;src/content/posts/&#96; 目录中编辑\n3. 参考[官方指南](https://docs.astro.build/zh-cn/guides/deploy/)将博客部署至 Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages 等；部署前需编辑 &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; 中的站点设置。\n\n## 🚀 使用方法 2\n\n1. 使用此模板[生成新仓库](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari/generate)或 Fork 此仓库\n2. 进行本地开发，Clone 新的仓库，执行 &#96;pnpm install&#96; 和 &#96;pnpm add sharp&#96; 以安装依赖  \n   - 若未安装 [pnpm](https://pnpm.io)，执行 &#96;npm install -g pnpm&#96;\n3. 通过配置文件 &#96;src/config.ts&#96; 自定义博客\n4. 执行 &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96; 创建新文章，并在 &#96;src/content/posts/&#96; 目录中编辑\n5. 参考[官方指南](https://docs.astro.build/zh-cn/guides/deploy/)将博客部署至 Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages 等；部署前需编辑 &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; 中的站点设置。\n\n## ⚙️ 文章 Frontmatter\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\n---\ntitle: My First Blog Post\npublished: 2023-09-09\ndescription: This is the first post of my new Astro blog.\nimage: ./cover.jpg\ntags: [Foo, Bar]\ncategory: Front-end\n",
```

```json
        "contents": "function loadButtonScript() {\n    let switchBtn = document.getElementById(\"scheme-switch\");\n    if (switchBtn) {\n        switchBtn.onclick = function () {\n            switchTheme()\n        };\n    }\n\n    let settingBtn = document.getElementById(\"display-settings-switch\");\n    if (settingBtn) {\n        settingBtn.onclick = function () {\n            let settingPanel = document.getElementById(\"display-setting\");\n            if (settingPanel) {\n                settingPanel.classList.toggle(\"float-panel-closed\");\n            }\n        };\n    }\n\n    let menuBtn = document.getElementById(\"nav-menu-switch\");\n    if (menuBtn) {\n        menuBtn.onclick = function () {\n            let menuPanel = document.getElementById(\"nav-menu-panel\");\n            if (menuPanel) {\n                menuPanel.classList.toggle(\"float-panel-closed\");\n            }\n        };\n    }\n}\n\nloadButtonScript();\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n{import.meta.env.PROD \u0026\u0026 \u003cscript is:inline define:vars={{scriptUrl: url('/pagefind/pagefind.js')}}\u003e\nasync function loadPagefind() {\n    try {\n        const response = await fetch(scriptUrl, { method: 'HEAD' });\n        if (!response.ok) {\n            throw new Error(&#96;Pagefind script not found: ${response.status}&#96;);\n        }\n\n        const pagefind = await import(scriptUrl);\n\n        await pagefind.options({\n            excerptLength: 20\n        });\n\n        window.pagefind = pagefind;\n\n        document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('pagefindready'));\n        console.log('Pagefind loaded and initialized successfully, event dispatched.');\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('Failed to load Pagefind:', error);\n        window.pagefind = {\n            search: () =\u003e Promise.resolve({ results: [] }),\n            options: () =\u003e Promise.resolve(),\n        };\n        document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('pagefindloaderror'));\n        console.log('Pagefind load error, event dispatched.');\n    }\n}\n\n",

        "originalContents": "function loadButtonScript() {\n    let switchBtn = document.getElementById(\"scheme-switch\");\n    if (switchBtn) {\n        switchBtn.onclick = function () {\n            switchTheme()\n        };\n    }\n\n    let settingBtn = document.getElementById(\"display-settings-switch\");\n    if (settingBtn) {\n        settingBtn.onclick = function () {\n            let settingPanel = document.getElementById(\"display-setting\");\n            if (settingPanel) {\n                settingPanel.classList.toggle(\"float-panel-closed\");\n            }\n        };\n    }\n\n    let menuBtn = document.getElementById(\"nav-menu-switch\");\n    if (menuBtn) {\n        menuBtn.onclick = function () {\n            let menuPanel = document.getElementById(\"nav-menu-panel\");\n            if (menuPanel) {\n                menuPanel.classList.toggle(\"float-panel-closed\");\n            }\n        };\n    }\n}\n\nloadButtonScript();\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n{import.meta.env.PROD \u0026\u0026 \u003cscript is:inline define:vars={{scriptUrl: url('/pagefind/pagefind.js')}}\u003e\nasync function loadPagefind() {\n    try {\n        const response = await fetch(scriptUrl, { method: 'HEAD' });\n        if (!response.ok) {\n            throw new Error(&#96;Pagefind script not found: ${response.status}&#96;);\n        }\n\n        const pagefind = await import(scriptUrl);\n\n        await pagefind.options({\n            excerptLength: 20\n        });\n\n        window.pagefind = pagefind;\n\n        document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('pagefindready'));\n        console.log('Pagefind loaded and initialized successfully, event dispatched.');\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('Failed to load Pagefind:', error);\n        window.pagefind = {\n            search: () =\u003e Promise.resolve({ results: [] }),\n            options: () =\u003e Promise.resolve(),\n        };\n        document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('pagefindloaderror'));\n        console.log('Pagefind load error, event dispatched.');\n    }\n}\n\n",

        "contents": "---\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/400.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/500.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/700.css\";\n\nimport ConfigCarrier from \"@components/ConfigCarrier.astro\";\nimport { profileConfig, siteConfig } from \"@/config\";\nimport {\n\tAUTO_MODE,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_HOME,\n\tDARK_MODE,\n\tDEFAULT_THEME,\n\tLIGHT_MODE,\n\tPAGE_WIDTH,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport { defaultFavicons } from \"../constants/icon\";\nimport type { Favicon } from \"../types/config\";\nimport { pathsEqual, url } from \"../utils/url-utils\";\nimport \"katex/dist/katex.css\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n}\n\nlet { title, banner, description, lang, setOGTypeArticle } = Astro.props;\n\n// apply a class to the body element to decide the height of the banner, only used for initial page load\n// Swup can update the body for each page visit, but it's after the page transition, causing a delay for banner height change\n// so use Swup hooks instead to change the height immediately when a link is clicked\nconst isHomePage = pathsEqual(Astro.url.pathname, url(\"/\"));\n\n// defines global css variables\n// why doing this in Layout instead of GlobalStyles: https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/6728#issuecomment-1502203757\nconst configHue = siteConfig.themeColor.hue;\nif (!banner || typeof banner !== \"string\" || banner.trim() === \"\") {\n\tbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n}\n\n// TODO don't use post cover as banner for now\nbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n\nconst enableBanner = siteConfig.banner.enable;\n\nlet pageTitle: string;\nif (title) {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${title} - ${siteConfig.title}&#96;;\n} else {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${siteConfig.title} - ${siteConfig.subtitle}&#96;;\n}\n\nconst favicons: Favicon[] =\n\tsiteConfig.favicon.length \u003e 0 ? siteConfig.favicon : defaultFavicons;\n\n// const siteLang = siteConfig.lang.replace('_', '-')\nif (!lang) {\n\tlang = &#96;${siteConfig.lang}&#96;;\n}\nconst siteLang = lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\");\n\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/400.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/500.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/700.css\";\n\nimport ConfigCarrier from \"@components/ConfigCarrier.astro\";\nimport { profileConfig, siteConfig } from \"@/config\";\nimport {\n\tAUTO_MODE,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_HOME,\n\tDARK_MODE,\n\tDEFAULT_THEME,\n\tLIGHT_MODE,\n\tPAGE_WIDTH,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport { defaultFavicons } from \"../constants/icon\";\nimport type { Favicon } from \"../types/config\";\nimport { pathsEqual, url } from \"../utils/url-utils\";\nimport \"katex/dist/katex.css\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n}\n\nlet { title, banner, description, lang, setOGTypeArticle } = Astro.props;\n\n// apply a class to the body element to decide the height of the banner, only used for initial page load\n// Swup can update the body for each page visit, but it's after the page transition, causing a delay for banner height change\n// so use Swup hooks instead to change the height immediately when a link is clicked\nconst isHomePage = pathsEqual(Astro.url.pathname, url(\"/\"));\n\n// defines global css variables\n// why doing this in Layout instead of GlobalStyles: https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/6728#issuecomment-1502203757\nconst configHue = siteConfig.themeColor.hue;\nif (!banner || typeof banner !== \"string\" || banner.trim() === \"\") {\n\tbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n}\n\n// TODO don't use post cover as banner for now\nbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n\nconst enableBanner = siteConfig.banner.enable;\n\nlet pageTitle: string;\nif (title) {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${title} - ${siteConfig.title}&#96;;\n} else {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${siteConfig.title} - ${siteConfig.subtitle}&#96;;\n}\n\nconst favicons: Favicon[] =\n\tsiteConfig.favicon.length \u003e 0 ? siteConfig.favicon : defaultFavicons;\n\n// const siteLang = siteConfig.lang.replace('_', '-')\nif (!lang) {\n\tlang = &#96;${siteConfig.lang}&#96;;\n}\nconst siteLang = lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\");\n\n",

        "contents": "\nimport { pluginCustomCopyButton } from \"./src/plugins/expressive-code/custom-copy-button.js\";\n\n// https://astro.build/config\nexport default defineConfig({\n\tsite: \"https://tutttuwi.github.io\",\n\tbase: \"/\",\n\ttrailingSlash: \"always\",\n\tintegrations: [\n\t\ttailwind({\n\t\t\tnesting: true,\n\t\t}),\n\t\tswup({\n\t\t\ttheme: false,\n\t\t\tanimationClass: \"transition-swup-\", // see https://swup.js.org/options/#animationselector\n\t\t\t// the default value &#96;transition-&#96; cause transition delay\n\t\t\t// when the Tailwind class &#96;transition-all&#96; is used\n\t\t\tcontainers: [\"main\", \"#toc\"],\n\t\t\tsmoothScrolling: true,\n\t\t\tcache: true,\n\t\t\tpreload: true,\n\t\t\taccessibility: true,\n\t\t\tupdateHead: true,\n\t\t\tupdateBodyClass: false,\n\t\t\tglobalInstance: true,\n\t\t}),\n\t\ticon({\n\t\t\tinclude: {\n\t\t\t\t\"preprocess: vitePreprocess(),\": [\"*\"],\n\t\t\t\t\"fa6-brands\": [\"*\"],\n\t\t\t\t\"fa6-regular\": [\"*\"],\n\t\t\t\t\"fa6-solid\": [\"*\"],\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}),\n\t\texpressiveCode({\n\t\t\tthemes: [expressiveCodeConfig.theme, expressiveCodeConfig.theme],\n\t\t\tplugins: [\n\t\t\t\tpluginCollapsibleSections(),\n\t\t\t\tpluginLineNumbers(),\n\t\t\t\tpluginLanguageBadge(),\n\t\t\t\tpluginCustomCopyButton()\n\t\t\t],\n\t\t\tdefaultProps: {\n\t\t\t\twrap: true,\n\t\t\t\toverridesByLang: {\n\t\t\t\t\t'shellsession': {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tshowLineNumbers: false,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "import { remarkReadingTime } from \"./src/plugins/remark-reading-time.mjs\";"

        "contents": "---\nimport BackToTop from \"@components/control/BackToTop.astro\";\nimport Footer from \"@components/Footer.astro\";\nimport Navbar from \"@components/Navbar.astro\";\nimport SideBar from \"@components/widget/SideBar.astro\";\nimport type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"../components/misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport TOC from \"../components/widget/TOC.astro\";\nimport { siteConfig } from \"../config\";\nimport {\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tMAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport Layout from \"./Layout.astro\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n\theadings?: MarkdownHeading[];\n}\n\nconst {\n\ttitle,\n\tbanner,\n\tdescription,\n\tlang,\n\tsetOGTypeArticle,\n\theadings = [],\n} = Astro.props;\nconst hasBannerCredit =\n\tsiteConfig.banner.enable \u0026\u0026 siteConfig.banner.credit.enable;\nconst hasBannerLink = !!siteConfig.banner.credit.url;\n\nconst mainPanelTop = siteConfig.banner.enable\n\t? &#96;calc(${BANNER_HEIGHT}vh - ${MAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT}rem)&#96;\n\t: \"5.5rem\";\n---\n\n\u003cLayout title={title} banner={banner} description={description} lang={lang} setOGTypeArticle={setOGTypeArticle}\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Navbar --\u003e\n\u003cslot slot=\"head\" name=\"head\"\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n\u003cdiv id=\"top-row\" class=\"z-50 pointer-events-none relative transition-all duration-700 max-w-[var(--page-width)] px-0 md:px-4 mx-auto\" class:list={[\"\"]}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"navbar-wrapper\" class=\"pointer-events-auto sticky top-0 transition-all\"\u003e\n        \u003cNavbar\u003e\u003c/Navbar\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Banner --\u003e\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport BackToTop from \"@components/control/BackToTop.astro\";\nimport Footer from \"@components/Footer.astro\";\nimport Navbar from \"@components/Navbar.astro\";\nimport SideBar from \"@components/widget/SideBar.astro\";\nimport type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"../components/misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport TOC from \"../components/widget/TOC.astro\";\nimport { siteConfig } from \"../config\";\nimport {\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tMAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport Layout from \"./Layout.astro\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n\theadings?: MarkdownHeading[];\n}\n\nconst {\n\ttitle,\n\tbanner,\n\tdescription,\n\tlang,\n\tsetOGTypeArticle,\n\theadings = [],\n} = Astro.props;\nconst hasBannerCredit =\n\tsiteConfig.banner.enable \u0026\u0026 siteConfig.banner.credit.enable;\nconst hasBannerLink = !!siteConfig.banner.credit.url;\n\nconst mainPanelTop = siteConfig.banner.enable\n\t? &#96;calc(${BANNER_HEIGHT}vh - ${MAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT}rem)&#96;\n\t: \"5.5rem\";\n---\n\n\u003cLayout title={title} banner={banner} description={description} lang={lang} setOGTypeArticle={setOGTypeArticle}\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Navbar --\u003e\n\u003cslot slot=\"head\" name=\"head\"\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n\u003cdiv id=\"top-row\" class=\"z-50 pointer-events-none relative transition-all duration-700 max-w-[var(--page-width)] px-0 md:px-4 mx-auto\" class:list={[\"\"]}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"navbar-wrapper\" class=\"pointer-events-auto sticky top-0 transition-all\"\u003e\n        \u003cNavbar\u003e\u003c/Navbar\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Banner --\u003e\n",
        "range": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\twindow.swup.hooks.on('visit:end', (_visit: {to: {url: string}}) =\u003e {\n\t\tsetTimeout(() =\u003e {\n\t\t\tconst heightExtend = document.getElementById('page-height-extend')\n\t\t\tif (heightExtend) {\n\t\t\t\theightExtend.classList.add('hidden')\n\t\t\t}\n\n            // Just make the transition looks better\n            const toc = document.getElementById('toc-wrapper');\n            if (toc) {\n                toc.classList.remove('toc-not-ready')\n            }\n        }, 200)\n\t});\n}\nif (window?.swup?.hooks) {\n\tsetup()\n} else {\n\tdocument.addEventListener('swup:enable', setup)\n}\n\nlet backToTopBtn = document.getElementById('back-to-top-btn');\nlet toc = document.getElementById('toc-wrapper');\nlet navbar = document.getElementById('navbar-wrapper')\nfunction scrollFunction() {\n\tlet bannerHeight = window.innerHeight * (BANNER_HEIGHT / 100)\n\n\tif (backToTopBtn) {\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight) {\n\t\t\tbackToTopBtn.classList.remove('hide')\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tbackToTopBtn.classList.add('hide')\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif (bannerEnabled \u0026\u0026 toc) {\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight) {\n\t\t\ttoc.classList.remove('toc-hide')\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\ttoc.classList.add('toc-hide')\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif (!bannerEnabled) return\n\tif (navbar) {\n\t\tconst NAVBAR_HEIGHT = 72\n\t\tconst MAIN_PANEL_EXCESS_HEIGHT = MAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT * 16\t\t\t// The height the main panel overlaps the banner\n\n\t\tlet bannerHeight = BANNER_HEIGHT\n\t\tif (document.body.classList.contains('lg:is-home') \u0026\u0026 window.innerWidth \u003e= 1024) {\n\t\t\tbannerHeight = BANNER_HEIGHT_HOME\n\t\t}\n\t\tlet threshold = window.innerHeight * (bannerHeight / 100) - NAVBAR_HEIGHT - MAIN_PANEL_EXCESS_HEIGHT - 16\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e= threshold || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e= threshold) {\n\t\t\tnavbar.classList.add('navbar-hidden')\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tnavbar.classList.remove('navbar-hidden')\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\nwindow.onscroll = scrollFunction\n\n",

        "contents": "\tlightbox.addFilter(\"domItemData\", (itemData, element) =\u003e {\n\t\tif (element instanceof HTMLImageElement) {\n\t\t\titemData.src = element.src\n\n\t\t\titemData.w = Number(element.naturalWidth || window.innerWidth)\n\t\t\titemData.h = Number(element.naturalHeight || window.innerHeight)\n\n\t\t\titemData.msrc = element.src\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn itemData\n\t})\n\n\tlightbox.init()\n}\n\nconst setup = () =\u003e {\n\tif (!lightbox) {\n\t\tcreatePhotoSwipe()\n\t}\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on(\"page:view\", () =\u003e {\n\t\tcreatePhotoSwipe()\n\t})\n\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on(\n\t\t\"content:replace\",\n\t\t() =\u003e {\n\t\t\tlightbox?.destroy?.()\n\t\t},\n\t\t{ before: true },\n\t)\n}\n\nif (window.swup) {\n\tsetup()\n} else {\n\tdocument.addEventListener(\"swup:enable\", setup)\n}\n\u003c/script\u003e\n",

        "originalContents": "\tlightbox.addFilter(\"domItemData\", (itemData, element) =\u003e {\n\t\tif (element instanceof HTMLImageElement) {\n\t\t\titemData.src = element.src\n\n\t\t\titemData.w = Number(element.naturalWidth || window.innerWidth)\n\t\t\titemData.h = Number(element.naturalHeight || window.innerHeight)\n\n\t\t\titemData.msrc = element.src\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn itemData\n\t})\n\n\tlightbox.init()\n}\n\nconst setup = () =\u003e {\n\tif (!lightbox) {\n\t\tcreatePhotoSwipe()\n\t}\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on(\"page:view\", () =\u003e {\n\t\tcreatePhotoSwipe()\n\t})\n\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on(\n\t\t\"content:replace\",\n\t\t() =\u003e {\n\t\t\tlightbox?.destroy?.()\n\t\t},\n\t\t{ before: true },\n\t)\n}\n\nif (window.swup) {\n\tsetup()\n} else {\n\tdocument.addEventListener(\"swup:enable\", setup)\n}\n\u003c/script\u003e\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function disableAnimation() {\n\tconst css = document.createElement('style')\n\tcss.appendChild(\n\t\tdocument.createTextNode(\n\t\t\t&#96;*{\n              -webkit-transition:none!important;\n              -moz-transition:none!important;\n              -o-transition:none!important;\n              -ms-transition:none!important;\n              transition:none!important\n              }&#96;\n\t\t)\n\t)\n\tdocument.head.appendChild(css)\n\n\treturn () =\u003e {\n\t\t// Force restyle\n\t\t;(() =\u003e window.getComputedStyle(document.body))()\n\n\t\t// Wait for next tick before removing\n\t\tsetTimeout(() =\u003e {\n\t\t\tdocument.head.removeChild(css)\n\t\t}, 1)\n\t}\n}\n*/\n\nconst bannerEnabled = !!document.getElementById('banner-wrapper')\n\nfunction setClickOutsideToClose(panel: string, ignores: string[]) {\n\tdocument.addEventListener(\"click\", event =\u003e {\n\t\tlet panelDom = document.getElementById(panel);\n\t\tlet tDom = event.target;\n\t\tif (!(tDom instanceof Node)) return;\t\t// Ensure the event target is an HTML Node\n\t\tfor (let ig of ignores) {\n\t\t\tlet ie = document.getElementById(ig)\n\t\t\tif (ie == tDom || (ie?.contains(tDom))) {\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tpanelDom!.classList.add(\"float-panel-closed\");\n\t});\n}\nsetClickOutsideToClose(\"display-setting\", [\"display-setting\", \"display-settings-switch\"])\nsetClickOutsideToClose(\"nav-menu-panel\", [\"nav-menu-panel\", \"nav-menu-switch\"])\nsetClickOutsideToClose(\"search-panel\", [\"search-panel\", \"search-bar\", \"search-switch\"])\n\n\nfunction loadTheme() {\n\tconst theme = getStoredTheme()\n\tsetTheme(theme)\n}\n\nfunction loadHue() {\n\tsetHue(getHue())\n}\n\n",
```

_**Agent (default)**_


MermaidJSの設定を追加しました。変更点は以下の通りです：

1. **`rehype-mermaid`パッケージのインストール** - MermaidJSのコードブロックを処理するプラグイン
2. **`astro.config.mjs`へのプラグイン追加** - `rehypePlugins`に`rehypeMermaid`を追加
3. **`Layout.astro`へのMermaidJSスクリプト追加** - クライアントサイドでMermaidJSを読み込み、初期化
4. **Swupのページ遷移時の再初期化** - ページ遷移後にMermaidJSを再実行

これで、`about.md`のMermaidJSコードブロックが表示されます。

開発サーバーで確認してください：

```bash
pnpm dev
```

MermaidJSのタイムライン図が表示されるはずです。表示されない場合は、`rehype-mermaid`の出力形式を確認し、必要に応じて調整します。

---

_**User (2026-02-22 18:24:26Z)**_

@zsh (983-1010) 
このエラーが出ます

---

_**Agent (default)**_


`rehype-mermaid`が`playwright`に依存しており、SSRでMermaidJSをレンダリングするためです。クライアントサイドのみでレンダリングする方式に切り替えます。`rehype-mermaid`を削除し、MermaidJSコードブロックを`<pre class="mermaid">`に変換するカスタムプラグインに置き換えます。

```json
        "originalContents": "import { definePlugin } from \"@expressive-code/core\";\nimport type { Element } from \"hast\";\n\nexport function pluginCustomCopyButton() {\n\treturn definePlugin({\n\t\tname: \"Custom Copy Button\",\n\t\thooks: {\n\t\t\tpostprocessRenderedBlock: (context) =\u003e {\n\t\t\t\tfunction traverse(node: Element) {\n\t\t\t\t\tif (node.type === \"element\" \u0026\u0026 node.tagName === \"pre\") {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tprocessCodeBlock(node);\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif (node.children) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const child of node.children) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (child.type === \"element\") traverse(child);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tfunction processCodeBlock(node: Element) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst copyButton = {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: \"element\" as const,\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttagName: \"button\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tproperties: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tclassName: [\"copy-btn\"],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"aria-label\": \"Copy code\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tchildren: [\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: \"element\" as const,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttagName: \"div\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tproperties: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tclassName: [\"copy-btn-icon\"],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},",
        "range": {

            "line": 89
          },
          "startPosition": {}

        "relativeWorkspacePath": "src/plugins/expressive-code/custom-copy-button.ts"

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/// \u003creference types=\"mdast\" /\u003e\nimport { h } from \"hastscript\";\n\n/**\n * Creates an admonition component.\n *\n * @param {Object} properties - The properties of the component.\n * @param {string} [properties.title] - An optional title.\n * @param {('tip'|'note'|'important'|'caution'|'warning')} type - The admonition type.\n * @param {import('mdast').RootContent[]} children - The children elements of the component.\n * @returns {import('mdast').Parent} The created admonition component.\n */\nexport function AdmonitionComponent(properties, children, type) {\n\tif (!Array.isArray(children) || children.length === 0)\n\t\treturn h(\n\t\t\t\"div\",\n\t\t\t{ class: \"hidden\" },\n\t\t\t'Invalid admonition directive. (Admonition directives must be of block type \":::note{name=\"name\"} \u003ccontent\u003e :::\")',\n\t\t);\n\n\tlet label = null;\n\tif (properties?.[\"has-directive-label\"]) {\n\t\tlabel = children[0]; // The first child is the label\n\t\t// biome-ignore lint/style/noParameterAssign: \u003ccheck later\u003e\n\t\tchildren = children.slice(1);\n\t\tlabel.tagName = \"div\"; // Change the tag \u003cp\u003e to \u003cdiv\u003e\n\t}\n\n\treturn h(\"blockquote\", { class: &#96;admonition bdm-${type}&#96; }, [\n\t\th(\"span\", { class: \"bdm-title\" }, label ? label : type.toUpperCase()),\n\t\t...children,\n\t]);\n}",

        "originalContents": "/// \u003creference types=\"mdast\" /\u003e\nimport { h } from \"hastscript\";\n\n/**\n * Creates an admonition component.\n *\n * @param {Object} properties - The properties of the component.\n * @param {string} [properties.title] - An optional title.\n * @param {('tip'|'note'|'important'|'caution'|'warning')} type - The admonition type.\n * @param {import('mdast').RootContent[]} children - The children elements of the component.\n * @returns {import('mdast').Parent} The created admonition component.\n */\nexport function AdmonitionComponent(properties, children, type) {\n\tif (!Array.isArray(children) || children.length === 0)\n\t\treturn h(\n\t\t\t\"div\",\n\t\t\t{ class: \"hidden\" },\n\t\t\t'Invalid admonition directive. (Admonition directives must be of block type \":::note{name=\"name\"} \u003ccontent\u003e :::\")',\n\t\t);\n\n\tlet label = null;\n\tif (properties?.[\"has-directive-label\"]) {\n\t\tlabel = children[0]; // The first child is the label\n\t\t// biome-ignore lint/style/noParameterAssign: \u003ccheck later\u003e\n\t\tchildren = children.slice(1);\n\t\tlabel.tagName = \"div\"; // Change the tag \u003cp\u003e to \u003cdiv\u003e\n\t}\n\n\treturn h(\"blockquote\", { class: &#96;admonition bdm-${type}&#96; }, [\n\t\th(\"span\", { class: \"bdm-title\" }, label ? label : type.toUpperCase()),\n\t\t...children,\n\t]);\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { h } from \"hastscript\";\nimport { visit } from \"unist-util-visit\";\n\nexport function parseDirectiveNode() {\n\treturn (tree, { _data }) =\u003e {\n\t\tvisit(tree, (node) =\u003e {\n\t\t\tif (\n\t\t\t\tnode.type === \"containerDirective\" ||\n\t\t\t\tnode.type === \"leafDirective\" ||\n\t\t\t\tnode.type === \"textDirective\"\n\t\t\t) {\n\t\t\t\t// biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noAssignInExpressions: \u003ccheck later\u003e\n\t\t\t\tconst data = node.data || (node.data = {});\n\t\t\t\tnode.attributes = node.attributes || {};\n\t\t\t\tif (\n\t\t\t\t\tnode.children.length \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026\n\t\t\t\t\tnode.children[0].data \u0026\u0026\n\t\t\t\t\tnode.children[0].data.directiveLabel\n\t\t\t\t) {\n\t\t\t\t\t// Add a flag to the node to indicate that it has a directive label\n\t\t\t\t\tnode.attributes[\"has-directive-label\"] = true;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tconst hast = h(node.name, node.attributes);\n\n\t\t\t\tdata.hName = hast.tagName;\n\t\t\t\tdata.hProperties = hast.properties;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\t};\n}",

        "originalContents": "import { h } from \"hastscript\";\nimport { visit } from \"unist-util-visit\";\n\nexport function parseDirectiveNode() {\n\treturn (tree, { _data }) =\u003e {\n\t\tvisit(tree, (node) =\u003e {\n\t\t\tif (\n\t\t\t\tnode.type === \"containerDirective\" ||\n\t\t\t\tnode.type === \"leafDirective\" ||\n\t\t\t\tnode.type === \"textDirective\"\n\t\t\t) {\n\t\t\t\t// biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noAssignInExpressions: \u003ccheck later\u003e\n\t\t\t\tconst data = node.data || (node.data = {});\n\t\t\t\tnode.attributes = node.attributes || {};\n\t\t\t\tif (\n\t\t\t\t\tnode.children.length \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026\n\t\t\t\t\tnode.children[0].data \u0026\u0026\n\t\t\t\t\tnode.children[0].data.directiveLabel\n\t\t\t\t) {\n\t\t\t\t\t// Add a flag to the node to indicate that it has a directive label\n\t\t\t\t\tnode.attributes[\"has-directive-label\"] = true;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tconst hast = h(node.name, node.attributes);\n\n\t\t\t\tdata.hName = hast.tagName;\n\t\t\t\tdata.hProperties = hast.properties;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\t};\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/**\n * Based on the discussion at https://github.com/expressive-code/expressive-code/issues/153#issuecomment-2282218684\n */\nimport { definePlugin } from \"@expressive-code/core\";\n\nexport function pluginLanguageBadge() {\n\treturn definePlugin({\n\t\tname: \"Language Badge\",\n\t\t// @ts-expect-error\n\t\tbaseStyles: ({ _cssVar }) =\u003e &#96;\n      [data-language]::before {\n        position: absolute;\n        z-index: 2;\n        right: 0.5rem;\n        top: 0.5rem;\n        padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;\n        content: attr(data-language);\n        font-family: \"JetBrains Mono Variable\", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, \"Liberation Mono\", \"Courier New\", monospace;\n        font-size: 0.75rem;\n        font-weight: bold;\n        text-transform: uppercase;\n        color: oklch(0.75 0.1 var(--hue));\n        background: oklch(0.33 0.035 var(--hue));\n        border-radius: 0.5rem;\n        pointer-events: none;\n        transition: opacity 0.3s;\n        opacity: 0;\n      }\n      .frame:not(.has-title):not(.is-terminal) {\n        @media (hover: none) {\n          \u0026 [data-language]::before {\n            opacity: 1;\n            margin-right: 3rem;\n          }\n          \u0026 [data-language]:active::before {\n            opacity: 0;\n          }\n        }\n        @media (hover: hover) {\n          \u0026 [data-language]::before {\n            opacity: 1;\n          }\n          \u0026:hover [data-language]::before {\n            opacity: 0;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    &#96;,\n\t});\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "/**\n * Based on the discussion at https://github.com/expressive-code/expressive-code/issues/153#issuecomment-2282218684\n */\nimport { definePlugin } from \"@expressive-code/core\";\n\nexport function pluginLanguageBadge() {\n\treturn definePlugin({\n\t\tname: \"Language Badge\",\n\t\t// @ts-expect-error\n\t\tbaseStyles: ({ _cssVar }) =\u003e &#96;\n      [data-language]::before {\n        position: absolute;\n        z-index: 2;\n        right: 0.5rem;\n        top: 0.5rem;\n        padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;\n        content: attr(data-language);\n        font-family: \"JetBrains Mono Variable\", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, \"Liberation Mono\", \"Courier New\", monospace;\n        font-size: 0.75rem;\n        font-weight: bold;\n        text-transform: uppercase;\n        color: oklch(0.75 0.1 var(--hue));\n        background: oklch(0.33 0.035 var(--hue));\n        border-radius: 0.5rem;\n        pointer-events: none;\n        transition: opacity 0.3s;\n        opacity: 0;\n      }\n      .frame:not(.has-title):not(.is-terminal) {\n        @media (hover: none) {\n          \u0026 [data-language]::before {\n            opacity: 1;\n            margin-right: 3rem;\n          }\n          \u0026 [data-language]:active::before {\n            opacity: 0;\n          }\n        }\n        @media (hover: hover) {\n          \u0026 [data-language]::before {\n            opacity: 1;\n          }\n          \u0026:hover [data-language]::before {\n            opacity: 0;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    &#96;,\n\t});\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 49
          },

        "contents": "// biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noShadowRestrictedNames: \u003ctoString from mdast-util-to-string\u003e\nimport { toString } from \"mdast-util-to-string\";\n\n/* Use the post's first paragraph as the excerpt */\nexport function remarkExcerpt() {\n\treturn (tree, { data }) =\u003e {\n\t\tlet excerpt = \"\";\n\t\tfor (const node of tree.children) {\n\t\t\tif (node.type !== \"paragraph\") {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\texcerpt = toString(node);\n\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t}\n\t\tdata.astro.frontmatter.excerpt = excerpt;\n\t};\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export function GithubCardComponent(properties, children) {\n\n\n\t...\n\n\n\tconst nScript = h(\n\t\t&#96;script#${cardUuid}-script&#96;,\n\t\t{ type: \"text/javascript\", defer: true },\n\t\t&#96;\n      fetch('https://api.github.com/repos/${repo}', { referrerPolicy: \"no-referrer\" }).then(response =\u003e response.json()).then(data =\u003e {\n        document.getElementById('${cardUuid}-description').innerText = data.description?.replace(/:[a-zA-Z0-9_]+:/g, '') || \"Description not set\";\n        document.getElementById('${cardUuid}-language').innerText = data.language;\n        document.getElementById('${cardUuid}-forks').innerText = Intl.NumberFormat('en-us', { notation: \"compact\", maximumFractionDigits: 1 }).format(data.forks).replaceAll(\"\\u202f\", '');\n        document.getElementById('${cardUuid}-stars').innerText = Intl.NumberFormat('en-us', { notation: \"compact\", maximumFractionDigits: 1 }).format(data.stargazers_count).replaceAll(\"\\u202f\", '');\n        const avatarEl = document.getElementById('${cardUuid}-avatar');\n        avatarEl.style.backgroundImage = 'url(' + data.owner.avatar_url + ')';\n        avatarEl.style.backgroundColor = 'transparent';\n        document.getElementById('${cardUuid}-license').innerText = data.license?.spdx_id || \"no-license\";\n        document.getElementById('${cardUuid}-card').classList.remove(\"fetch-waiting\");\n        console.log(\"[GITHUB-CARD] Loaded card for ${repo} | ${cardUuid}.\")\n      }).catch(err =\u003e {\n        const c = document.getElementById('${cardUuid}-card');\n        c?.classList.add(\"fetch-error\");\n        console.warn(\"[GITHUB-CARD] (Error) Loading card for ${repo} | ${cardUuid}.\")\n      })\n    &#96;,\n\t);\n\n\treturn h(\n\t\t&#96;a#${cardUuid}-card&#96;,\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tclass: \"card-github fetch-waiting no-styling\",\n\t\t\thref: &#96;https://github.com/${repo}&#96;,\n\t\t\ttarget: \"_blank\",\n\t\t\trepo,\n\t\t},\n\t\t[\n\t\t\tnTitle,\n\t\t\tnDescription,\n\t\t\th(\"div\", { class: \"gc-infobar\" }, [nStars, nForks, nLicense, ```diff
```
```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,53 @@
- 
+ import { visit } from "unist-util-visit";
+ 
+ /**
+  * Rehype plugin to convert Mermaid code blocks to &lt;pre class="mermaid"&gt; elements
+  * This allows MermaidJS to render them on the client side
+  */
+ export function rehypeMermaid() {
+ 	return (tree) =&gt; {
+ 		visit(tree, (node) =&gt; {
+ 			if (
+ 				node.type === "element" &amp;&amp;
+ 				node.tagName === "pre" &amp;&amp;
+ 				node.children &amp;&amp;
+ 				node.children[0] &amp;&amp;
+ 				node.children[0].type === "element" &amp;&amp;
+ 				node.children[0].tagName === "code"
+ 			) {
+ 				const codeNode = node.children[0];
+ 				const className = codeNode.properties?.className || [];
+ 				const isMermaid = Array.isArray(className) &amp;&amp; className.includes("language-mermaid");
+ 
+ 				if (isMermaid) {
+ 					// Convert to &lt;pre class="mermaid"&gt; with the code content as text
+ 					node.tagName = "pre";
+ 					node.properties = {
+ 						...node.properties,
+ 						className: ["mermaid"],
+ 					};
+ 
+ 					// Extract the text content from the code block
+ 					const getTextContent = (node) =&gt; {
+ 						if (node.type === "text") {
+ 							return node.value;
+ 						}
+ 						if (node.children) {
+ 							return node.children.map(getTextContent).join("");
+ 						}
+ 						return "";
+ 					};
+ 
+ 					const mermaidCode = getTextContent(codeNode);
+ 					node.children = [
+ 						{
+ 							type: "text",
+ 							value: mermaidCode,
+ 						},
+ 					];
+ 				}
+ 			}
+ 		});
+ 	};
+ }
+ 
```

```json
{
  "codeResults": [
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "---\ntitle: Expressive Code Example\npublished: 2024-04-10\ndescription: How code blocks look in Markdown using Expressive Code.\ntags: [Markdown, Blogging, Demo]\ncategory: Examples\ndraft: false\n---\n\nHere, we'll explore how code blocks look using [Expressive Code](https://expressive-code.com/). The provided examples are based on the official documentation, which you can refer to for further details.\n\n## Expressive Code\n\n### Syntax Highlighting\n\n[Syntax Highlighting](https://expressive-code.com/key-features/syntax-highlighting/)\n\n#### Regular syntax highlighting\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js\nconsole.log('This code is syntax highlighted!')\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Rendering ANSI escape sequences\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;ansi\nANSI colors:\n- Regular: \u001b[31mRed\u001b[0m \u001b[32mGreen\u001b[0m \u001b[33mYellow\u001b[0m \u001b[34mBlue\u001b[0m \u001b[35mMagenta\u001b[0m \u001b[36mCyan\u001b[0m\n- Bold:    \u001b[1;31mRed\u001b[0m \u001b[1;32mGreen\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33mYellow\u001b[0m \u001b[1;34mBlue\u001b[0m \u001b[1;35mMagenta\u001b[0m \u001b[1;36mCyan\u001b[0m\n- Dimmed:  \u001b[2;31mRed\u001b[0m \u001b[2;32mGreen\u001b[0m \u001b[2;33mYellow\u001b[0m \u001b[2;34mBlue\u001b[0m \u001b[2;35mMagenta\u001b[0m \u001b[2;36mCyan\u001b[0m\n\n256 colors (showing colors 160-177):\n\u001b[38;5;160m160 \u001b[38;5;161m161 \u001b[38;5;162m162 \u001b[38;5;163m163 \u001b[38;5;164m164 \u001b[38;5;165m165\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;5;166m166 \u001b[38;5;167m167 \u001b[38;5;168m168 \u001b[38;5;169m169 \u001b[38;5;170m170 \u001b[38;5;171m171\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;5;172m172 \u001b[38;5;173m173 \u001b[38;5;174m174 \u001b[38;5;175m175 \u001b[38;5;176m176 \u001b[38;5;177m177\u001b[0m\n\nFull RGB colors:\n\u001b[38;2;34;139;34mForestGreen - RGB(34, 139, 34)\u001b[0m\n\nText formatting: \u001b[1mBold\u001b[0m \u001b[2mDimmed\u001b[0m \u001b[3mItalic\u001b[0m \u001b[4mUnderline\u001b[0m\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Editor \u0026 Terminal Frames\n\n[Editor \u0026 Terminal Frames](https://expressive-code.com/key-features/frames/)\n\n#### Code editor frames\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js title=\"my-test-file.js\"\nconsole.log('Title attribute example')\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;html\n\u003c!-- src/content/index.html --\u003e\n\u003cdiv\u003eFile name comment example\u003c/div\u003e\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Terminal frames\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\necho \"This terminal frame has no title\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;powershell title=\"PowerShell terminal example\"\nWrite-Output \"This one has a title!\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Overriding frame types\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sh frame=\"none\"\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "---\ntitle: Expressive Code Example\npublished: 2024-04-10\ndescription: How code blocks look in Markdown using Expressive Code.\ntags: [Markdown, Blogging, Demo]\ncategory: Examples\ndraft: false\n---\n\nHere, we'll explore how code blocks look using [Expressive Code](https://expressive-code.com/). The provided examples are based on the official documentation, which you can refer to for further details.\n\n## Expressive Code\n\n### Syntax Highlighting\n\n[Syntax Highlighting](https://expressive-code.com/key-features/syntax-highlighting/)\n\n#### Regular syntax highlighting\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js\nconsole.log('This code is syntax highlighted!')\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Rendering ANSI escape sequences\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;ansi\nANSI colors:\n- Regular: \u001b[31mRed\u001b[0m \u001b[32mGreen\u001b[0m \u001b[33mYellow\u001b[0m \u001b[34mBlue\u001b[0m \u001b[35mMagenta\u001b[0m \u001b[36mCyan\u001b[0m\n- Bold:    \u001b[1;31mRed\u001b[0m \u001b[1;32mGreen\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33mYellow\u001b[0m \u001b[1;34mBlue\u001b[0m \u001b[1;35mMagenta\u001b[0m \u001b[1;36mCyan\u001b[0m\n- Dimmed:  \u001b[2;31mRed\u001b[0m \u001b[2;32mGreen\u001b[0m \u001b[2;33mYellow\u001b[0m \u001b[2;34mBlue\u001b[0m \u001b[2;35mMagenta\u001b[0m \u001b[2;36mCyan\u001b[0m\n\n256 colors (showing colors 160-177):\n\u001b[38;5;160m160 \u001b[38;5;161m161 \u001b[38;5;162m162 \u001b[38;5;163m163 \u001b[38;5;164m164 \u001b[38;5;165m165\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;5;166m166 \u001b[38;5;167m167 \u001b[38;5;168m168 \u001b[38;5;169m169 \u001b[38;5;170m170 \u001b[38;5;171m171\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;5;172m172 \u001b[38;5;173m173 \u001b[38;5;174m174 \u001b[38;5;175m175 \u001b[38;5;176m176 \u001b[38;5;177m177\u001b[0m\n\nFull RGB colors:\n\u001b[38;2;34;139;34mForestGreen - RGB(34, 139, 34)\u001b[0m\n\nText formatting: \u001b[1mBold\u001b[0m \u001b[2mDimmed\u001b[0m \u001b[3mItalic\u001b[0m \u001b[4mUnderline\u001b[0m\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Editor \u0026 Terminal Frames\n\n[Editor \u0026 Terminal Frames](https://expressive-code.com/key-features/frames/)\n\n#### Code editor frames\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js title=\"my-test-file.js\"\nconsole.log('Title attribute example')\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;html\n\u003c!-- src/content/index.html --\u003e\n\u003cdiv\u003eFile name comment example\u003c/div\u003e\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Terminal frames\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\necho \"This terminal frame has no title\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;powershell title=\"PowerShell terminal example\"\nWrite-Output \"This one has a title!\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Overriding frame types\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sh frame=\"none\"\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/**\n * Based on the discussion at https://github.com/expressive-code/expressive-code/issues/153#issuecomment-2282218684\n */\nimport { definePlugin } from \"@expressive-code/core\";\n\nexport function pluginLanguageBadge() {\n\treturn definePlugin({\n\t\tname: \"Language Badge\",\n\t\t// @ts-expect-error\n\t\tbaseStyles: ({ _cssVar }) =\u003e &#96;\n      [data-language]::before {\n        position: absolute;\n        z-index: 2;\n        right: 0.5rem;\n        top: 0.5rem;\n        padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;\n        content: attr(data-language);\n        font-family: \"JetBrains Mono Variable\", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, \"Liberation Mono\", \"Courier New\", monospace;\n        font-size: 0.75rem;\n        font-weight: bold;\n        text-transform: uppercase;\n        color: oklch(0.75 0.1 var(--hue));\n        background: oklch(0.33 0.035 var(--hue));\n        border-radius: 0.5rem;\n        pointer-events: none;\n        transition: opacity 0.3s;\n        opacity: 0;\n      }\n      .frame:not(.has-title):not(.is-terminal) {\n        @media (hover: none) {\n          \u0026 [data-language]::before {\n            opacity: 1;\n            margin-right: 3rem;\n          }\n          \u0026 [data-language]:active::before {\n            opacity: 0;\n          }\n        }\n        @media (hover: hover) {\n          \u0026 [data-language]::before {\n            opacity: 1;\n          }\n          \u0026:hover [data-language]::before {\n            opacity: 0;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    &#96;,\n\t});\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "/**"

        "originalContents": "/**\n * Based on the discussion at https://github.com/expressive-code/expressive-code/issues/153#issuecomment-2282218684\n */\nimport { definePlugin } from \"@expressive-code/core\";\n\nexport function pluginLanguageBadge() {\n\treturn definePlugin({\n\t\tname: \"Language Badge\",\n\t\t// @ts-expect-error\n\t\tbaseStyles: ({ _cssVar }) =\u003e &#96;\n      [data-language]::before {\n        position: absolute;\n        z-index: 2;\n        right: 0.5rem;\n        top: 0.5rem;\n        padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;\n        content: attr(data-language);\n        font-family: \"JetBrains Mono Variable\", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, \"Liberation Mono\", \"Courier New\", monospace;\n        font-size: 0.75rem;\n        font-weight: bold;\n        text-transform: uppercase;\n        color: oklch(0.75 0.1 var(--hue));\n        background: oklch(0.33 0.035 var(--hue));\n        border-radius: 0.5rem;\n        pointer-events: none;\n        transition: opacity 0.3s;\n        opacity: 0;\n      }\n      .frame:not(.has-title):not(.is-terminal) {\n        @media (hover: none) {\n          \u0026 [data-language]::before {\n            opacity: 1;\n            margin-right: 3rem;\n          }\n          \u0026 [data-language]:active::before {\n            opacity: 0;\n          }\n        }\n        @media (hover: hover) {\n          \u0026 [data-language]::before {\n            opacity: 1;\n          }\n          \u0026:hover [data-language]::before {\n            opacity: 0;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    &#96;,\n\t});\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "-all contents will remain unmodified\n no whitespace will be removed either\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Combining syntax highlighting with diff-like syntax\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;diff lang=\"js\"\n  function thisIsJavaScript() {\n    // This entire block gets highlighted as JavaScript,\n    // and we can still add diff markers to it!\n-   console.log('Old code to be removed')\n+   console.log('New and shiny code!')\n  }\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Marking individual text inside lines\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js \"given text\"\nfunction demo() {\n  // Mark any given text inside lines\n  return 'Multiple matches of the given text are supported';\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Regular expressions\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;ts /ye[sp]/\nconsole.log('The words yes and yep will be marked.')\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Escaping forward slashes\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sh /\\/ho.*\\//\necho \"Test\" \u003e /home/test.txt\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Selecting inline marker types (mark, ins, del)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js \"return true;\" ins=\"inserted\" del=\"deleted\"\nfunction demo() {\n  console.log('These are inserted and deleted marker types');\n  // The return statement uses the default marker type\n  return true;\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Word Wrap\n\n[Word Wrap](https://expressive-code.com/key-features/word-wrap/)\n\n#### Configuring word wrap per block\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js wrap\n// Example with wrap\nfunction getLongString() {\n  return 'This is a very long string that will most probably not fit into the available space unless the container is extremely wide'\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js wrap=false\n// Example with wrap=false\nfunction getLongString() {\n  return 'This is a very long string that will most probably not fit into the available space unless the container is extremely wide'\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Configuring indentation of wrapped lines\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js wrap preserveIndent\n// Example with preserveIndent (enabled by default)\nfunction getLongString() {\n  return 'This is a very long string that will most probably not fit into the available space unless the container is extremely wide'\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js wrap preserveIndent=false\n// Example with preserveIndent=false\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { definePlugin } from \"@expressive-code/core\";\nimport type { Element } from \"hast\";\n\nexport function pluginCustomCopyButton() {\n\treturn definePlugin({\n\t\tname: \"Custom Copy Button\",\n\t\thooks: {\n\t\t\tpostprocessRenderedBlock: (context) =\u003e {\n\t\t\t\tfunction traverse(node: Element) {\n\t\t\t\t\tif (node.type === \"element\" \u0026\u0026 node.tagName === \"pre\") {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tprocessCodeBlock(node);\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif (node.children) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const child of node.children) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (child.type === \"element\") traverse(child);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tfunction processCodeBlock(node: Element) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst copyButton = {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: \"element\" as const,\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttagName: \"button\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tproperties: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tclassName: [\"copy-btn\"],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"aria-label\": \"Copy code\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tchildren: [\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: \"element\" as const,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttagName: \"div\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tproperties: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tclassName: [\"copy-btn-icon\"],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": "import { definePlugin } from \"@expressive-code/core\";\nimport type { Element } from \"hast\";\n\nexport function pluginCustomCopyButton() {\n\treturn definePlugin({\n\t\tname: \"Custom Copy Button\",\n\t\thooks: {\n\t\t\tpostprocessRenderedBlock: (context) =\u003e {\n\t\t\t\tfunction traverse(node: Element) {\n\t\t\t\t\tif (node.type === \"element\" \u0026\u0026 node.tagName === \"pre\") {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tprocessCodeBlock(node);\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif (node.children) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const child of node.children) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (child.type === \"element\") traverse(child);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tfunction processCodeBlock(node: Element) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst copyButton = {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: \"element\" as const,\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttagName: \"button\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tproperties: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tclassName: [\"copy-btn\"],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"aria-label\": \"Copy code\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tchildren: [\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: \"element\" as const,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttagName: \"div\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tproperties: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tclassName: [\"copy-btn-icon\"],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function getLongString() {\n  return 'This is a very long string that will most probably not fit into the available space unless the container is extremely wide'\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Collapsible Sections\n\n[Collapsible Sections](https://expressive-code.com/plugins/collapsible-sections/)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js collapse={1-5, 12-14, 21-24}\n// All this boilerplate setup code will be collapsed\nimport { someBoilerplateEngine } from '@example/some-boilerplate'\nimport { evenMoreBoilerplate } from '@example/even-more-boilerplate'\n\nconst engine = someBoilerplateEngine(evenMoreBoilerplate())\n\n// This part of the code will be visible by default\nengine.doSomething(1, 2, 3, calcFn)\n\nfunction calcFn() {\n  // You can have multiple collapsed sections\n  const a = 1\n  const b = 2\n  const c = a + b\n\n  // This will remain visible\n  console.log(&#96;Calculation result: ${a} + ${b} = ${c}&#96;)\n  return c\n}\n\n// All this code until the end of the block will be collapsed again\nengine.closeConnection()\nengine.freeMemory()\nengine.shutdown({ reason: 'End of example boilerplate code' })\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Line Numbers\n\n[Line Numbers](https://expressive-code.com/plugins/line-numbers/)\n\n### Displaying line numbers per block\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js showLineNumbers\n// This code block will show line numbers\nconsole.log('Greetings from line 2!')\nconsole.log('I am on line 3')\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js showLineNumbers=false\n// Line numbers are disabled for this block\nconsole.log('Hello?')\nconsole.log('Sorry, do you know what line I am on?')\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Changing the starting line number\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js showLineNumbers startLineNumber=5\nconsole.log('Greetings from line 5!')\nconsole.log('I am on line 6')\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n",

        "originalContents": "function getLongString() {\n  return 'This is a very long string that will most probably not fit into the available space unless the container is extremely wide'\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Collapsible Sections\n\n[Collapsible Sections](https://expressive-code.com/plugins/collapsible-sections/)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js collapse={1-5, 12-14, 21-24}\n// All this boilerplate setup code will be collapsed\nimport { someBoilerplateEngine } from '@example/some-boilerplate'\nimport { evenMoreBoilerplate } from '@example/even-more-boilerplate'\n\nconst engine = someBoilerplateEngine(evenMoreBoilerplate())\n\n// This part of the code will be visible by default\nengine.doSomething(1, 2, 3, calcFn)\n\nfunction calcFn() {\n  // You can have multiple collapsed sections\n  const a = 1\n  const b = 2\n  const c = a + b\n\n  // This will remain visible\n  console.log(&#96;Calculation result: ${a} + ${b} = ${c}&#96;)\n  return c\n}\n\n// All this code until the end of the block will be collapsed again\nengine.closeConnection()\nengine.freeMemory()\nengine.shutdown({ reason: 'End of example boilerplate code' })\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Line Numbers\n\n[Line Numbers](https://expressive-code.com/plugins/line-numbers/)\n\n### Displaying line numbers per block\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js showLineNumbers\n// This code block will show line numbers\nconsole.log('Greetings from line 2!')\nconsole.log('I am on line 3')\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js showLineNumbers=false\n// Line numbers are disabled for this block\nconsole.log('Hello?')\nconsole.log('Sorry, do you know what line I am on?')\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Changing the starting line number\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;js showLineNumbers startLineNumber=5\nconsole.log('Greetings from line 5!')\nconsole.log('I am on line 6')\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n",
        "range": {

          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    .frame:hover .copy-btn {\n        opacity: 1;\n    }\n\n    .copy-btn-icon {\n        @apply absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transition -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 fill-white pointer-events-none;\n    }\n    .copy-btn .copy-icon {\n        @apply opacity-100 fill-white dark:fill-white/75;\n    }\n    .copy-btn.success .copy-icon {\n        @apply opacity-0 fill-[var(--deep-text)]\n    }\n    .copy-btn .success-icon {\n        @apply opacity-0 fill-white;\n    }\n    .copy-btn.success .success-icon {\n        @apply opacity-100\n    }\n\n    .expressive-code {\n        @apply my-4;\n        ::selection {\n            @apply bg-[var(--codeblock-selection)];\n        }\n    }\n\n\n    ul, ol {\n        li::marker {\n            @apply text-[var(--primary)];\n        }\n    }\n\n    blockquote {\n        @apply not-italic border-transparent relative;\n        font-weight: inherit;\n\n        \u0026:before {\n            @apply content-[''] absolute -left-1 block transition bg-[var(--btn-regular-bg)] h-full w-1 rounded-full;\n        }\n\n        /* Remove the double quotes from default styles */\n        p:before, p:after {\n            @apply content-none;\n        }\n\n    }\n\n    .katex-display-container {\n        max-width: 100%;\n        overflow-x: auto;\n        margin: 1em 0;\n    }\n    \n}\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/// \u003creference types=\"mdast\" /\u003e\nimport { h } from \"hastscript\";\n\n/**\n * Creates an admonition component.\n *\n * @param {Object} properties - The properties of the component.\n * @param {string} [properties.title] - An optional title.\n * @param {('tip'|'note'|'important'|'caution'|'warning')} type - The admonition type.\n * @param {import('mdast').RootContent[]} children - The children elements of the component.\n * @returns {import('mdast').Parent} The created admonition component.\n */\nexport function AdmonitionComponent(properties, children, type) {\n\tif (!Array.isArray(children) || children.length === 0)\n\t\treturn h(\n\t\t\t\"div\",\n\t\t\t{ class: \"hidden\" },\n\t\t\t'Invalid admonition directive. (Admonition directives must be of block type \":::note{name=\"name\"} \u003ccontent\u003e :::\")',\n\t\t);\n\n\tlet label = null;\n\tif (properties?.[\"has-directive-label\"]) {\n\t\tlabel = children[0]; // The first child is the label\n\t\t// biome-ignore lint/style/noParameterAssign: \u003ccheck later\u003e\n\t\tchildren = children.slice(1);\n\t\tlabel.tagName = \"div\"; // Change the tag \u003cp\u003e to \u003cdiv\u003e\n\t}\n\n\treturn h(\"blockquote\", { class: &#96;admonition bdm-${type}&#96; }, [\n\t\th(\"span\", { class: \"bdm-title\" }, label ? label : type.toUpperCase()),\n\t\t...children,\n\t]);\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "/// \u003creference types=\"mdast\" /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import { h } from \"hastscript\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": " * Creates an admonition component."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": " *"
          },

        "originalContents": "/// \u003creference types=\"mdast\" /\u003e\nimport { h } from \"hastscript\";\n\n/**\n * Creates an admonition component.\n *\n * @param {Object} properties - The properties of the component.\n * @param {string} [properties.title] - An optional title.\n * @param {('tip'|'note'|'important'|'caution'|'warning')} type - The admonition type.\n * @param {import('mdast').RootContent[]} children - The children elements of the component.\n * @returns {import('mdast').Parent} The created admonition component.\n */\nexport function AdmonitionComponent(properties, children, type) {\n\tif (!Array.isArray(children) || children.length === 0)\n\t\treturn h(\n\t\t\t\"div\",\n\t\t\t{ class: \"hidden\" },\n\t\t\t'Invalid admonition directive. (Admonition directives must be of block type \":::note{name=\"name\"} \u003ccontent\u003e :::\")',\n\t\t);\n\n\tlet label = null;\n\tif (properties?.[\"has-directive-label\"]) {\n\t\tlabel = children[0]; // The first child is the label\n\t\t// biome-ignore lint/style/noParameterAssign: \u003ccheck later\u003e\n\t\tchildren = children.slice(1);\n\t\tlabel.tagName = \"div\"; // Change the tag \u003cp\u003e to \u003cdiv\u003e\n\t}\n\n\treturn h(\"blockquote\", { class: &#96;admonition bdm-${type}&#96; }, [\n\t\th(\"span\", { class: \"bdm-title\" }, label ? label : type.toUpperCase()),\n\t\t...children,\n\t]);\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 32
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "src/plugins/rehype-component-admonition.mjs"
```
